results.title: Leather wallpaper / Cuir de Cordoue (Wikipedia)
results.judge_reason: Authoritative source-domain reference describing Cordovan gilded-embossed leather hangings, directly grounding the source side of the analogy.

results.title: C is for Cordovan (Gilt Leather) — Gazette Drouot
results.judge_reason: Overview of cuir de Cordoue gilt-leather technique directly supports source-domain mechanism described in the candidate.

results.title: Mid-17thc Flemish embossed gilded leather wallpaper fragment (LAPADA)
results.judge_reason: Concrete 17th-century embossed gilded leather object example evidences the stamping/impression artifact class central to the source domain.

results.title: StyleTex: Style Image-Guided Texture Generation for 3D Models
results.judge_reason: Style-guided texture generation is related to stylistic motif application but uses image-conditioned 3D pipelines, not stamping-tool decoder over a base canvas.

results.title: StyleStudio: Text-Driven Style Transfer with Selective Control (CVPR 2025)
results.judge_reason: Selective style-element control parallels per-stamp motif modules conceptually, but lacks the substrate saturation / feedback-attenuation mechanism.

results.title: LLM-Based Text Style Transfer
results.judge_reason: LLM-side style transfer review establishes prior art for stylistic motif transfer in language models but does not introduce stamping/saturation dynamics.

results.title: Long Text Style Transfer with Dual-Layered Sentence/Paragraph Structure (ZeroStylus)
results.judge_reason: Hierarchical template-guided generation resembles stamping-template repertoire but operates layered, not via saturating-impression feedback on a single substrate.

results.title: TexGarment: Consistent Garment UV Texture Generation (CVPR 2025)
results.judge_reason: 3D garment UV texture generation is tangential — shares texture-on-substrate framing but no stamping repertoire or feedback attenuation mechanism.
